GeneralDescription.SourceString: Light the fuse and run the world.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: Light the fuse and run the world.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: TNTina has brought her explosive charm back to the Island, after a call from some old friends. But is the operative with a short fuse ready to rebuild old bridges, instead of blowing them to pieces?
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: TNTina has brought her explosive charm back to the Island, after a call from some old friends. But is the operative with a short fuse ready to rebuild old bridges, instead of blowing them to pieces?
